transcript:
Speaker A: Stop saying "I am fine", "thank you", "I don't know", "You are welcome". Ye bahut basic English hai. Pehle mai bhi aisi hi English bolti thi. Phir maine MySivi pe practice karna shuru kiya. [Stop saying "I am fine", "thank you", "I don't know", "You are welcome". This is very basic English. Earlier I also used to speak English like this. Then I started practicing on MySivi.]
Speaker B: What is your name?
Speaker A: My name is Neha.
Speaker B: How old are you?
Speaker A: I have 22.
Speaker B: "I have 22" nahi, "I am 22 years old" hota hai. ["I have 22" is incorrect, it should be "I am 22 years old".]
Speaker A: Okay okay. I am 22 years old.
Speaker B: Where are you from?
Speaker A: I am Uttar Pradesh.
Speaker B: "I am Uttar Pradesh" nahi, "I am from Uttar Pradesh" hoga. ["I am Uttar Pradesh" is incorrect, it should be "I am from Uttar Pradesh".]
Speaker A: Theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Okay, okay. I don't know English very well.]
Speaker B: Koi problem nahi. AI teacher ke saath try kiya? [No problem. Have you tried with an AI teacher?]
Speaker A: Wo toh mehenge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?]
Speaker B: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Speaker A: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.]
Speaker B: Roz sirf 15 se 20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Speaker A: Kaise join karu? [How do I join?]
Speaker B: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dinon mein tumhe improvements dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvements in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]

summary: The ad features a young woman practicing English with an AI robot tutor on the MySivi app. The robot corrects her common grammatical mistakes in real-time, demonstrating how the app works. The ad highlights that the app is affordable, requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice, and encourages users to install it to see improvements within 15 days.
